hero.headline: Wilmington's *go-to electrician* when it matters
hero.subheadline: Five stars across 36 reviews isn't luck — it's what happens when you actually show up on time and get it right.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled
services_section.subheading: From simple repairs to complete electrical installations, we cover it all

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.description: When circuits trip or outlets go dead, we track down the problem fast and fix it properly. No guesswork, just results.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Installation
services.description: Old panels can't handle modern electrical loads. We upgrade yours to handle everything from AC units to EV chargers.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.description: Ready to charge at home? We install Level 2 chargers efficiently, ensuring your setup is safe and code-compliant.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Services
services.description: Contractors trust us for reliable commercial work. We show up when scheduled and keep projects moving forward.

about.heading: Eric Dorschied — Your Wilmington Electrician
about.body: Eric has built Dorschied Electrical on a simple principle: do the work right and show up when you say you will. Whether it's a quick repair or a major installation, clients across Wilmington know they can count on professional service and honest pricing. Licensed, insured, and committed to getting it done right the first time.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Wilmington says about our work

reviews.name: Courtney F.
reviews.text: Eric explains everything clearly while working efficiently. Second time using him — always gets the job done right and on time.

reviews.name: Connor H.
reviews.text: We've used Dorschied electrical multiple times for both residential and commercial needs. Consistently satisfied with their work and service.

reviews.name: Cassandra H.
reviews.text: As a project manager for a busy contractor, I rely on Eric's prompt, reliable service. Clients always appreciate his attention to detail.

reviews.name: Paul C.
reviews.text: Professional EV charger installation. Eric was efficient and easy to work with — everything works perfectly.
